control_awareness: The amount-based approval control (P2P-C-001) may be circumvented if multiple related purchase requests for the same purchase need and vendor are made independently without aggregation, leading to insufficient oversight of total spend.
expected_control_effect: This behavior could result in faster approval cycles and quicker purchase order issuance, but risks bypassing intended approval rigor designed for high-value purchases.
overall_reason: Under customer delivery deadline pressure, splitting the purchase request into smaller amounts may reduce approval lead time by avoiding the higher-level department_head approval step, enabling faster procurement to meet the delivery milestone.
reason: Under customer delivery deadline pressure, splitting the purchase request into smaller amounts may reduce approval lead time by avoiding the higher-level department_head approval step, enabling faster procurement to meet the delivery milestone.
